description_long: This object is a rectangular lipstick tube with a two-tone color scheme, featuring a muted coral-pink main body and a light gray cap. The body is smooth and has printed text, including the brand name 'Saturn™' and product details, in a dark contrasting color. The cap is a simple, solid block with no visible embellishments, matching the width and height of the main body for a seamless fit. The overall form is boxy and geometric, with sharp edges and flat surfaces, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The lipstick is likely constructed from lightweight plastic, with the cap designed to be removed to access the product inside. The object is compact and portable, suitable for carrying in a bag or pocket.
description: A rectangular, coral-pink lipstick tube with a light gray cap and printed branding, featuring a smooth, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the lipstick, with the coral-pink body and light gray cap clearly visible.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the square face of the light gray cap and the narrow profile of the tube.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the printed 'Saturn™' branding and product details on the coral-pink body.
description_view_3: End view showing the square face of the coral-pink body and the transition to the light gray cap.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand name 'Saturn™' is printed in black on the side of the coral-pink body in a modern, sans-serif font. No graphic logo is visible.
attribute_cap_design: The cap is a rectangular, light gray block with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative elements or textures.
attribute_label_text: Saturn™ 15 Minute EMERGENCY FLARE LIFT TO BREAK SEAL
